body:
You have a new connection request.

Jamie Chen (Senior Engineering Manager at Netflix) would like to connect on LinkedIn. Jamie wrote: 'Saw your talk at HackCMU — would love to stay in touch as you apply for summer internships.'

View profile: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jamie-chen-ex

You're receiving this because you have notifications enabled. Manage your preferences in Settings.
subject: Jamie Chen wants to connect on LinkedIn
